languages.text: Целые континенты этого мира опутаны сетью бесконечных городов. Счет населения идет на сотни миллионов душ, обитающих в высотных шпилях — лишь самые привилегированные могут похвастаться тем, что когда-либо видели небо.

traits.locale_text: Целые континенты этого мира опутаны сетью бесконечных городов. Счет населения идет на сотни миллионов душ, обитающих в огромных высотных комплексах — лишь самые привилегированные могут похвастаться тем, что когда-либо видели небо.

Целые континенты этого мира опутаны сетью бесконечных городов. Счет населения идет на сотни миллионов душ, обитающих в высотных шпилях — лишь самые привилегированные могут похвастаться тем, что когда-либо видели небо.

languages.text: A web of giant cities dominates whole continents of this world. The population numbers in the hundreds of millions, occupying the many city spires — although only a precious few can boast that they've ever seen the sky.
languages.original_text: Целые континенты этого мира опутаны сетью бесконечных городов. Счет населения идет на сотни миллионов душ, обитающих в высотных шпилях — лишь самые привилегированные могут похвастаться тем, что когда-либо видели небо.

traits.locale_text: The web of giant cities covers whole continents of this world, and population is often more than hundreds of millions. Precious few have the luxury of living at the top city spires and seeing the sky as they rise.

The web of giant cities covers whole continents of this world, and population is often more than hundreds of millions. Precious few have the luxury of living at the top city spires and seeing the sky as they rise.

A web of giant cities dominates whole continents of this world. The population numbers in the hundreds of millions, occupying the many city spires — although only a precious few can boast that they've ever seen the sky.

A web of giant cities dominates whole continents of this world. The population numbers in the hundreds of millions, occupying the many city spires — although only a precious few can boast that they've ever seen the sky.

A web of giant cities dominates whole continents of this world. The population numbers in the hundreds of millions, occupying the many city spires — although only a precious few can boast that they've ever seen the sky.

A web of giant cities dominates whole continents of this world. The population numbers in the hundreds of millions, occupying the many city spires — although only a precious few can boast that they've ever seen the sky.

languages.text: Ein Netz aus riesigen Städten beherrscht ganze Kontinente dieser Welt. Hunderte von Millionen Menschen bevölkern die vielen Stadttürme — aber nur wenige können sich rühmen, jemals den Himmel gesehen zu haben.
languages.original_text: A web of giant cities dominates whole continents of this world. The population numbers in the hundreds of millions, occupying the many city spires — although only a precious few can boast that they've ever seen the sky.

traits.locale_text: Ein Netz aus riesigen Städten beherrscht ganze Kontinente dieser Welt. Hunderte von Millionen Menschen bevölkern die vielen Stadttürme — aber nur wenige können sich rühmen, jemals den Himmel gesehen zu haben.

languages.text: Un réseau de villes géantes domine des continents entiers de ce monde. La population se compte en centaines de millions d'habitants, qui occupent les nombreux clochers des villes, bien que seuls quelques rares habitants puissent se vanter d'avoir vu le ciel.
languages.original_text: A web of giant cities dominates whole continents of this world. The population numbers in the hundreds of millions, occupying the many city spires — although only a precious few can boast that they've ever seen the sky.

traits.locale_text: Un réseau de villes géantes domine des continents entiers de ce monde. La population se compte en centaines de millions d'habitants, qui occupent les nombreux clochers des villes, bien que seuls quelques rares habitants puissent se vanter d'avoir vu le ciel.

languages.text: Una red de ciudades gigantescas domina continentes enteros de este mundo. La población se cuenta por cientos de millones y ocupa las numerosas torres de las ciudades, aunque sólo unos pocos pueden presumir de haber visto alguna vez el cielo.
languages.original_text: A web of giant cities dominates whole continents of this world. The population numbers in the hundreds of millions, occupying the many city spires — although only a precious few can boast that they've ever seen the sky.

traits.locale_text: Una red de ciudades gigantescas domina continentes enteros de este mundo. La población se cuenta por cientos de millones y ocupa las numerosas torres de las ciudades, aunque sólo unos pocos pueden presumir de haber visto alguna vez el cielo.

languages.text: Dev şehirlerden oluşan bir ağ, bu dünyanın tüm kıtalarına hükmediyor. Nüfus yüz milyonlarla ifade ediliyor ve çok sayıda şehir kulesini işgal ediyor — ancak yalnızca çok azı gökyüzünü görmüş olmakla övünebilir.
languages.original_text: A web of giant cities dominates whole continents of this world. The population numbers in the hundreds of millions, occupying the many city spires — although only a precious few can boast that they've ever seen the sky.

traits.locale_text: Dev şehirlerden oluşan bir ağ, bu dünyanın tüm kıtalarına hükmediyor. Nüfus yüz milyonlarla ifade ediliyor ve çok sayıda şehir kulesini işgal ediyor — ancak yalnızca çok azı gökyüzünü görmüş olmakla övünebilir.
